ingestion_path_changes.description: Added startup fail-closed guard: process.exit(1) when autorun=true and SGO_API_KEY is absent
Changed OddsApiIngestOptions.apiKey from required string to optional string; added explicit warning log when key absent

coverage: ingestLeague returns skipped with warning when SGO_API_KEY absent
ingestOddsApiLeague emits warning log when ODDS_API_KEY absent
collectConfiguredSgoApiKeyCandidates returns empty array when no SGO env vars set
